rules.styling: CSS variables and package CSS; no static visual inline styles
rules.componentMetadata: Read docs/metadata/components.json for component maturity, ownership, export status, routes, evidence, accessibility guidance, and limitations.

AppShell.rule: Do not fix persistent navigation with one-off app CSS when AppShell props can express the layout.

Field.relationshipRule: Use Field's render-function child when it should supply native control relationships. For a static child, pair Field htmlFor with the child control id.

SelectionControls.rule: Use Switch for persistent settings, ToggleButton for active tools or views, ToggleButtonGroup for related compact tools, SegmentedControl for small stable exclusive options, RadioGroup for spacious form choices, and Checkbox for independent Boolean values.

Toast.rule: Use ToastProvider and useToast for transient operation feedback only.

Overlays.rule: Popover, Menu, Dropdown, Tooltip, Dialog, Drawer, and ConfirmDialog use a shared private overlay foundation.
